meta.title: NIKKE PVP Team Builder — Win More Arena Matches
meta.description: Build winning NIKKE PVP teams in seconds. Select your roster, get optimized 5v5 and 15v15 SP Arena compositions with burst speed calculations. Free, no login required.
meta.keywords: NIKKE, PVP, arena, team builder, SP arena, 5v5, 15v15, burst speed, team composition, goddess of victory

landing.heading: Stop Losing Arena Matches — Build Better Teams in Seconds
landing.intro: NIKKE Arena Planner analyzes your roster and instantly recommends the strongest PVP teams you can build. No more guessing which characters to pair, no more losing to teams that burst faster than yours. Select the characters you own, and the planner does the rest.
landing.step1: Select the characters you own from the full roster of 187 NIKKEs
landing.step2: Get instant team recommendations for 5v5 Arena and 15v15 SP Arena
landing.step3: See burst speed, timing breakdowns, and why each team works
landing.feature1: Optimized 5v5 teams matched to proven meta archetypes (Scarlet nuke, Alice stall, Crown burst, and more)
landing.feature2: 15v15 SP Arena allocation — 3 non-overlapping teams built from your roster, optimized via simulated annealing
landing.feature3: Burst speed calculator showing exact charge timing for any 5-character combination
landing.feature4: Works with any roster size — whether you have 15 characters or 150
landing.feature5: Trilingual support (English, 繁體中文, 简体中文) — switch languages instantly
landing.footer: NIKKE Arena Planner is a free, open-source fan tool. Not affiliated with Shift Up or Level Infinite. Character data and arena mechanics based on community research.

about.title: About — How to Use NIKKE Arena Planner
about.metaDescription: Learn how to use NIKKE Arena Planner to build winning PVP teams. Understand burst speed tiers (2RL, 3RL, 5SG), burst chains, and team composition mechanics.
about.whatBody: NIKKE Arena Planner is a free tool that helps you build the strongest PVP teams from the characters you actually own. Instead of memorizing tier lists or copying teams you can't build, you tell the planner which NIKKEs you have — and it finds the best teams you can make right now. It covers both 5v5 Rookie Arena and 15v15 SP Arena (3 non-overlapping teams).
about.step1: Go to Team Builder and select the characters you own. Click any character to mark it as owned — owned characters get a highlighted border. You can filter by burst type, weapon, element, or manufacturer.
about.step2: Switch between 5v5 and 15v15 tabs to see team recommendations. Each suggestion shows the team archetype (e.g. Scarlet Nuke, Alice Stall), burst speed tier, and timing breakdown.
about.step3: Use the Burst Calculator (advanced) to experiment with custom teams. Pick any 5 characters and see exactly how fast they charge to full burst, with per-tier burst generation bars.
about.step4: Your roster is saved in your browser — come back anytime and your selections are still there. No account needed.
about.speedIntro: Speed tier measures how quickly your team reaches Full Burst (B1 → B2 → B3). It's named after how many Rocket Launcher (RL) reload cycles it takes. Faster = better — you burst before the enemy and win.
about.tier_2rl: Full burst in 2 RL cycles. Extremely fast — only possible with top-tier battery units like Jackal + clip RLs. Bursts before most enemies can react.
about.tier_5sg: Equivalent to 2.5 RL cycles. Very fast. Usually achieved with clip Shotgun batteries.
about.tier_3rl: Full burst in 3 RL cycles. The meta sweet spot — fast enough to win most matchups without over-restricting your team composition.
about.tier_7sg: Equivalent to 3.5 RL cycles. Decent but starting to lose to faster teams. Acceptable for stall/sustain compositions.
about.tier_4rl: Full burst in 4 RL cycles. Slow — you'll often lose to 2-3RL teams unless you have strong defensive units to survive until you burst.
about.tier_5rl: Full burst in 5 RL cycles. Very slow. Generally only viable with massive CP advantage or undying mechanics.
about.speedNote: Times are approximate. Actual timing depends on charge speed stats, weapon fire rates, and whether units enter/exit cover during battle.
about.termDesc_burstChain: Every team needs at least one Burst I, one Burst II, and one Burst III character. They fire in order: B1 first, then B2, then B3 (Full Burst). Without all three types, your team can't reach Full Burst.
about.termDesc_burstGen: The amount of burst gauge each character contributes per reload cycle. Higher burst gen = faster team. The total across all 5 characters determines your speed tier.
about.termDesc_position: Each team has 5 positions. P1 and P5 take the most damage (focused by enemy weapons). P3–P4 are the safest spots — put your DPS there. Tanks and defenders belong in P1/P5.
about.termDesc_cpPenalty: If your team's Combat Power is below 84.6% of the opponent's, you receive a stat penalty (20% to 90%). In SP Arena, distribute your strongest characters across all 3 teams to avoid this.
about.termDesc_lambda: Red Hood's unique burst type. She can act as Burst I, II, or III — filling whichever slot your team is missing. This makes her extremely flexible in team building.
